allow: PowerShell($nodePaths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm\\current\\node.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $nodePaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; & $p --version } }; $env:PATH -split ";" | Select-String -Pattern "node" -SimpleMatch)

PowerShell(Get-Command bun, pnpm, yarn, python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|npm|bun|yarn" })
